purpose.zh: 图文型展示、课程案例、视觉丰富型内容。
purpose.en: Image-rich showcases, course examples, and editorial visual decks.

style.zh: 多样化图文排版，杂志感强，适合视觉表达和案例集。
style.en: Editorial image-text layouts with varied magazine-like compositions.

templateStrength: Reusable style distilled from a finished PowerPoint deck.
